hero.title: Manage and Grow Across
hero.subtitle: Follow these guidelines to ensure compliance, accuracy, and smooth marketplace operations.

intro.text: Khulega Online is a SaaS-enabled platform that helps sellers connect, manage, and grow across multiple marketplaces from a unified system called the
intro.text3: Through Khulega Online, sellers can integrate and manage their business across leading marketplaces:
intro.text4: These Seller Guidelines define the operational standards, compliance requirements, and performance expectations for all sellers using Khulega Online and the USC dashboard.
intro.notice: By registering or using our services, you agree to comply with these guidelines.

sections.title: Seller Eligibility & Account Requirements
sections.intro: To sell using Khulega Online and access USC, sellers must:
listCheck: Comply with applicable Indian laws and taxation norms
sections.intro2: Khulega Online reserves the right to:
listArrow: Suspend accounts for incomplete or misleading information

sections.title: Unified Seller Commerce (USC) Usage Policy
sections.intro: The Unified Seller Commerce (usc.khulega.online) allows sellers to manage:
listCheck: Not sharing access with unauthorized parties
sections.alert: Any misuse of the USC platform may result in immediate account review.

sections.title: Marketplace Integration Responsibilities
sections.intro: Khulega Online enables integration with multiple marketplaces. However:
listWarning: Each marketplace has its own policies.
Sellers must comply individually with marketplace rules.
Violations on one marketplace may impact seller performance across integrations.
Khulega Online does not override marketplace compliance policies.

sections.title: Product Listing Guidelines
sections.intro: Accurate listings are critical to long-term growth.
sections.alert: Incorrect listings may lead to suppression or marketplace penalties.

sections.title: Inventory Management Standards
sections.alert: High cancellation rates due to stock issues may lead to account warnings.

sections.title: Pricing & Transparency Policy
sections.highlight: Khulega Online promotes ethical and fair selling practices.

sections.title: Order Fulfillment & Logistics
sections.intro: Timely order processing is mandatory. Sellers must:
sections.alert: Consistent delays or high return-to-origin (RTO) rates may trigger account evaluation.

sections.title: Returns & Refund Policy Compliance
sections.intro: Sellers must adhere to marketplace return policies. This includes:
sections.alert: Return abuse or non-cooperation may lead to suspension.

sections.title: Prohibited & Restricted Products
sections.alert: Sellers are fully responsible for regulatory compliance including FSSAI, BIS, and other applicable authorities.

sections.title: Performance Expectations
sections.intro: Khulega Online expects sellers to maintain:
sections.alert: Repeated underperformance may lead to review or suspension.

sections.title: Managed Seller Services
sections.intro: If sellers opt for additional services offered by Khulega Online (such as listing management, catalog optimization, account management, or advertising support):
listArrow: Service scope will be defined separately
Sellers must provide accurate product information
Khulega Online is not liable for incorrect data provided by sellers

sections.title: Data Security & System Integrity
listCheck: Not misuse reporting or analytics tools

sections.title: Account Suspension & Termination
sections.intro: Khulega Online may suspend or terminate seller access in cases of:
sections.alertDanger: Serious violations may lead to permanent restriction.

sections.title: Updates to Guidelines
sections.intro: Khulega Online may update these Seller Guidelines periodically. Continued use of the platform and USC dashboard constitutes acceptance of updated policies.

acknowledgment.title: Seller Acknowledgment
acknowledgment.text: By registering on Khulega Online and accessing the Unified Seller Commerce (usc.khulega.online), you confirm that:
list: You have read and understood these guidelines
You agree to comply with all platform standards
You accept responsibility for marketplace compliance
